description: Create a soft jaw fixture by modeling a 150 mm wide by 80 mm high solid block, centered on the origin and extruded by 15 mm. Subtract the part located at '/opt/solvespace_samples/divider.slvs' (imported at the origin) from the block to form a cavity. Save the project to '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/soft_jaw_fixture.slvs' and export the 3D model as a STEP file to '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/soft_jaw_fixture.step'.
